mdgm 0.1.0

Package index

Graph Construction

Create undirected graphs from various representations.

nug_from_edge_list()
Create an undirected graph from an edge list
nug_from_adj_list()
Create an undirected graph from an adjacency list
nug_from_adj_mat()
Create an undirected graph from an adjacency matrix
nug_from_grid()
Create a regular 2D grid graph

Model & Inference

Specify MDGM models and run MCMC.

mdgm_model()
Create an MDGM model
mcmc()
Run MCMC inference for an MDGM model
MdgmModel
MDGM Model
MdgmResult
MCMC Result

On this page
